title: cerolepis
intro: Cerolepis is a genus of flowering plants in the family Haloragaceae, commonly known as the water-dwelling or aquatic plants. The medicinal properties of Cerolepis plants are derived from their roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cerolepis include the treatment of wounds, skin irritations, and infections due to its antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Cerolepis can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, which can be applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
